zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Janet Douglas於1467年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig19歲，母親Janet Scott13歲。她於1488年與Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill)在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1519年1月19日在蘇格蘭度福利爾登斯可雷享年52歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋登斯可雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Janet Douglas于1467年出生在英国苏格兰时，她的父亲Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig19岁，母亲Janet Scott13岁。她于1488年与Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill)在苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1519年1月19日在苏格兰度福利爾登斯可雷享年52岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋登斯可雷。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Janet Douglas was born in 1467, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig, was 19 and her mother, Janet Scott, was 13. She married Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) in 1488, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 January 1519, in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Janet Douglas est née en 1467, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Janet Scott, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) en 1488, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 janvier 1519, à Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Janet Douglas 1467 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig 19 und ihre Mutter Janet Scott 13. Sie hat 1488 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Januar 1519 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Janet Douglas è nata il nel 1467 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Janet Scott, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) nel 1488, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 gennaio 1519, nel Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Janet Douglasが1467年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrigは19歳，母Janet Scottは13歳であった。1488年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでRoger Grierson (Lord Windiehill)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1519年1月19日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダンスコアで52歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイダンスコアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Janet Douglas(이)가 1467년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Scott(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1488년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 1월 19일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 던스코어에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 던스코어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Janet Douglas nasceu em 1467, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Janet Scott, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) em 1488, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1519, em Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Janet Douglas родилась в 1467 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Scott, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) в 1488 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 января 1519 г. в местности дунскор, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности дунскор, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Janet Douglas nació en 1467, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Janet Scott, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Roger Grierson (Lord Windiehill) en 1488, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de enero de 1519, en Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Escocia, Reino Unido.
